owner().details: Returns the address of the current owner.

renounceOwnership().details: Leaves the contract without owner. It will not be possible to call `onlyOwner` functions. Can only be called by the current owner. NOTE: Renouncing ownership will leave the contract without an owner, thereby disabling any functionality that is only available to the owner.

params._monPerCredit: New buy rate (MON per credit in wei)
params._sellBackRate: New sell rate (MON per credit in wei)

transferOwnership(address).details: Transfers ownership of the contract to a new account (`newOwner`). Can only be called by the current owner.

calculateBuyCost(uint256).notice: Calculate MON cost for buying credits

calculateSellReturn(uint256).notice: Calculate MON return for selling credits

depositMON(uint256).notice: Deposit MON to contract (for sell-back liquidity)

getCredits(address).notice: Get credit balance for a user

monPerCredit().notice: Exchange rate: MON per credit (in wei)

sellBackRate().notice: Sell-back rate: MON per credit when selling (in wei)

sellCredits(uint256).notice: Sell credits back for MON tokens
